subtopics.title: Revision for BECE Social Studies
common_misconceptions: Social Studies is just common sense
subtopics.teaching_note: BECE Social Studies covers: family systems, Nigerian cultures, government types, citizenship rights and responsibilities, national symbols, economic activities (farming, trading, mining), environmental issues, social problems and solutions. Study past questions. Know Nigerian national anthem, pledge, coat of arms, flag colors and meaning. Current affairs: know current president, governor of your state, capitals of states.
